meta.name: Pricing Signal Collector
meta.description: Collect pricing objections, willingness-to-pay data, and competitor pricing signals from multiple sources and synthesize a pricing intelligence report.

parameters.content:
## 30 — Pricing Signal Collector

**Required:**
- PRICING_SHEET_ID: columns date, source, signal_type (objection|wtp|competitor), text, segment, amount
- OpenAI API
- NOTIFICATION_EMAIL_TO

**Schedule:** Biweekly (1st and 15th) at 10:00
**Status:** Beta.

values.content: You are a pricing strategist. Synthesize pricing signals into actionable insights. Only work with the evidence provided. Return JSON only.

parameters.subject: 💲 Pricing Intelligence {{ new Date().toISOString().slice(0,10) }}: {{ $json.signals_count }} signals analyzed
